message:
Add code review comment to Ratings & Reviews EPIC

Document current MVP implementation state and remaining work
for agent coordination on jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -169,7 +169,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","title":"Add --json flag support for all new CLI commands","description":"Add --json flag support to all new CLI commands for machine-readable output. Commands to Update: - jfp login (output: { authenticated: true, email, tier }) - jfp logout (output: { logged_out: true }) - jfp whoami (output: { email, tier, user_id }) - jfp collections list (output: { collections: [...] }) - jfp collections show (output: { collection, items: [...] }) - jfp notes (output: { prompt_id, notes: [...] }) - jfp save (output: { saved: true, prompt_id }) - jfp list --mine/--saved (output: { prompts: [...] }) Implementation: - Add --json/-j flag to all relevant commands - When --json is set, output only valid JSON to stdout - Errors should also be JSON: { error: true, message, code } - Progress/status messages go to stderr when --json is enabled - Ensure consistent field naming across all commands ","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:15.385023105Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:20:01.044458985Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T02:20:01.044458985Z","close_reason":"All CLI commands now have --json flag support with consistent output format","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9g76","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:19.154441027Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cgj5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:08.868781233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9rgl","title":"Redesign 'Clear All Filters' as a proper button","description":"# Task: Redesign Clear Filters Button ## Current Implementation (page.tsx:165-172) ```tsx {hasActiveFilters && ( )} ``` ## Problems 1. Plain text link - low visual prominence 2. Uses indigo (inconsistent with neutral design system) 3. Only visible when filters active (no affordance) 4. No icon - relies entirely on text ## Proposed Design ### Option A: Always-visible ghost button (Recommended) ```tsx ``` ### Option B: Only when active, but as a proper button ```tsx {hasActiveFilters && ( )} ``` ## Implementation Details ### Add filter count calculation ```tsx const filterCount = useMemo(() => { let count = 0; if (filters.query) count++; if (filters.category) count++; count += filters.tags.length; return count; }, [filters]); ``` ### Add accessibility ```tsx aria-label={`Clear all ${filterCount} active filters`} ``` ## Design Rationale - Ghost button maintains visual hierarchy (filters are secondary to results) - Always visible = discoverable (disabled state indicates "nothing to clear") - Icon + text = clear meaning - Count badge = precise feedback - Matches CategoryFilter/TagFilter clear button pattern ## Testing 1. With no filters: button disabled, grayed out 2. With 1 filter: button enabled, shows "(1)" 3. With multiple: button shows count 4. Click clears all and disables button 5. Keyboard accessible (Tab, Enter) ## Files Modified - apps/web/src/app/page.tsx ## Dependencies - Should use the updated neutral color palette (do after color fix) - Matches pattern already used in TagFilter.tsx (Clear button)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-12T05:38:18.479565228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T15:06:14.296451909Z","closed_at":"2026-01-12T15:06:14.296451909Z","close_reason":"Implementation verified complete: Button component with ghost variant, X icon, filterCount memo, aria-label, and neutral colors. Build passes.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9rgl","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ogel","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-12T05:43:15.125413399Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","title":"Feature: GitHub Actions E2E Integration","description":"Add E2E tests to GitHub Actions CI workflow. Configure CLI E2E tests to run on push/PR. Configure Playwright for web E2E with proper browser setup. Upload test artifacts (screenshots, videos, logs) on failure. Optional: multi-browser test matrix for comprehensive coverage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:43:26.454174609Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T00:16:26.265863560Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T00:16:26.265863560Z","close_reason":"CI infrastructure implemented in parent EPIC","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:36.860791733Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jxd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:26.008125350Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-nfm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:59.405040418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9","title":"EPIC: Ratings & Reviews System","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-cdp. ## Overview Ratings and reviews provide quality signals for community content, helping users discover the best prompts, packs, and skills while rewarding creators for quality contributions. ## Rating System Design ### Simple Rating (MVP) - Thumbs up / thumbs down (binary) - Easy, low-friction interaction - Clear positive/negative signal - Calculate "approval rate" percentage ### Extended Rating (V2) - 1-5 star rating - Written review (optional) - Helpful/not helpful on reviews - Response from author ## Key Features ### Rate Content - One-click rating on any ratable content - Rate: prompts, packs, skills - Change rating anytime - See your rating history ### View Ratings - Show rating on content cards - Rating breakdown on detail pages - Sort by rating in lists - Filter by minimum rating ### Reviews (V2) - Write text review with rating - Edit/delete own reviews - Report inappropriate reviews - Author can respond to reviews ### Leaderboards - Top rated prompts this week/month - Top contributors by ratings received - Rising stars (new content with high ratings) ## Anti-Gaming Measures - One rating per user per item - Rate limiting on rapid ratings - Flag suspicious patterns - Weight by user reputation ## Database Schema - ratings (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_value, created_at, updated_at) - reviews (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_id, content, created_at) - review_votes (review_id, user_id, is_helpful) ## UI Components - RatingButton (thumbs up/down) - RatingDisplay (show current rating) - RatingBreakdown (detailed stats) - ReviewList (paginated reviews) - ReviewForm (write review) ## Integration Points - Community prompts (Swap Meet) - Prompt packs - Skills - Collections (V2) ","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"SilverPine","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:20:02.532432863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T03:58:13.022583752Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9","title":"EPIC: Ratings & Reviews System","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-cdp. ## Overview Ratings and reviews provide quality signals for community content, helping users discover the best prompts, packs, and skills while rewarding creators for quality contributions. ## Rating System Design ### Simple Rating (MVP) - Thumbs up / thumbs down (binary) - Easy, low-friction interaction - Clear positive/negative signal - Calculate "approval rate" percentage ### Extended Rating (V2) - 1-5 star rating - Written review (optional) - Helpful/not helpful on reviews - Response from author ## Key Features ### Rate Content - One-click rating on any ratable content - Rate: prompts, packs, skills - Change rating anytime - See your rating history ### View Ratings - Show rating on content cards - Rating breakdown on detail pages - Sort by rating in lists - Filter by minimum rating ### Reviews (V2) - Write text review with rating - Edit/delete own reviews - Report inappropriate reviews - Author can respond to reviews ### Leaderboards - Top rated prompts this week/month - Top contributors by ratings received - Rising stars (new content with high ratings) ## Anti-Gaming Measures - One rating per user per item - Rate limiting on rapid ratings - Flag suspicious patterns - Weight by user reputation ## Database Schema - ratings (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_value, created_at, updated_at) - reviews (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_id, content, created_at) - review_votes (review_id, user_id, is_helpful) ## UI Components - RatingButton (thumbs up/down) - RatingDisplay (show current rating) - RatingBreakdown (detailed stats) - ReviewList (paginated reviews) - ReviewForm (write review) ## Integration Points - Community prompts (Swap Meet) - Prompt packs - Skills - Collections (V2) ","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"SilverPine","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:20:02.532432863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T06:08:38.661920536Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"comments":[{"id":25,"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Code review by agent: MVP implementation is complete and solid. Current state: - RatingButton: Thumbs up/down with haptic feedback, animations, accessible - RatingDisplay: Compact/detailed variants with approval bar - API route: /api/ratings with GET/POST, rate limiting - Rating store: In-memory with proper key generation - useRating hook: SWR pattern with optimistic updates - E2E helpers: ratings-helpers.ts for testing Remaining work per EPIC: 1. Sort by rating in prompt lists 2. Filter by minimum rating 3. Leaderboards (top rated prompts) 4. V2: Written reviews 5. V2: Author responses Note: Rating persistence requires premium repo DB.","created_at":"2026-02-03T06:08:38Z"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wpw","title":"Fix useLocalStorage null persistence","description":"useLocalStorage skipped persisting null values because null used as sentinel; track latest value with a separate flag","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:55:53.211070932Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:56:21.167849624Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T22:56:21.167849624Z","close_reason":"Track latest value with flag so null can persist safely","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9","title":"Implement jfp open, categories, tags, doctor, about -- Details: open launches browser to permalink. categories/tags list with counts. doctor checks environment (cache, skills dirs). about shows ecosystem info + ASCII banner.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:27:23.461876267Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T07:37:37.501389089Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T07:37:37.501389089Z","close_reason":"Commands already implemented: open, categories, tags, doctor, about. All support --json output.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"labels":["status:in_progress"]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9.1","title":"State change: status → in_progress","description":"Set status to in_progress","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"event","created_at":"2026-01-10T07:36:05.003876937Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:37.411945766Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:37.411945766Z","close_reason":"Acknowledged state change - parent bead completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9.1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-10T07:36:05.005026843Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
